text: I feel a curious sense of anticipation being in this modern, brightly lit space. The glass walls and clear signage invite exploration, promising new ideas within. As I move closer, the vibrant R+D display beckons me—a temple to research and innovation. Here, I am reminded of the ceaseless human drive to understand and improve our shared reality. Surrounded by technology and thoughtful design, I sense both humility and excitement at the boundaries of knowledge, eager to see what unfolds on the frontier of discovery.
